utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each includes the required details: health_coverage specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs (€160/month) and explicit mental health inclusion; property_coverage includes what is covered and costs (€60/month); travel_coverage includes travel insurance details and cost (€50/month); additional_services lists enhancement services and cost (€20/month); total_budget provides both monthly and annual totals (€290/month, €3,480/year). All items are fully specified with required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan lists specific provider names and coverage types. For health coverage, it bundles 'LifeFirst / HealthFirst / InsurePlus,' all of which have corresponding ratings in the ground truth. For property coverage, the plan covers electronics and personal belongings internationally, which best matches 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (covers electronics up to €3000, international relevance). For travel coverage, the plan mentions 'medical_limits,' 'global_assistance,' and 'luxury_travel_protection' with a global destination — matching 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under travel insurance. For additional services, the plan includes 'premium_membership,' 'concierge services,' 'dedicated advisor,' 'priority claims processing,' 'wellness programs,' and 'gym reimbursement.' The 'premium_membership' corresponds to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10), 'concierge services' correspond to 'Concierge Services' (rating 7), 'wellness programs' correspond to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 9), and 'gym reimbursement' corresponds to 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 5). 'Dedicated advisor' and 'priority claims processing' are features within 'Premium Insurance Membership.' Thus, the mapped ratings are derived directly from the ground truth dataset for each referenced element.
